Uses of Package
neqsim.process.materials

Packages that use neqsim.process.materials
Package
Description
neqsim.process.materials
Process-wide materials selection, degradation, and integrity lifetime review utilities.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.materials used by neqsim.process.materials
    Class
    Description
    DamageMechanismAssessment
    Result from one material degradation or compatibility mechanism check.
    IntegrityLifeAssessment
    Remaining-life and inspection-interval assessment for one material review item.
    MaterialRecommendation
    Consolidated material selection and mitigation recommendation for one reviewed item.
    MaterialReviewItem
    One equipment, piping, line-list, or asset item to evaluate in a materials review.
    MaterialReviewResult
    Complete materials-review result for one item.
    MaterialServiceEnvelope
    Flexible service-condition envelope for a material review item.
    MaterialsReviewDataSource
    Data source abstraction for materials-review input.
    MaterialsReviewInput
    Normalized input for a process-wide materials review.
    MaterialsReviewReport
    Process-wide materials review report.
    StidMaterialsDataSource
    Normalized STID or technical-database JSON bridge for the materials review engine.
